title: MINI MOUNTAINEERS - 211info
text: BUILDING HEALTHY FAMILIES EASTERN OREGON MINI MOUNTAINEERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects families with nature and each other. Provides weekly outings including trail hikes, park and play, kid-led walks, urban strolls, and nature scavenger hunts. 2725 7th Street Room 002 Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-5 Hours: Varies by outing (541) 524-2331 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 398-0674 Main phone Union County (541) 524-2331 Main phone Baker County (541) 426-3414 FAX Main phone (541) 524-2331 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or visit Facebook group page FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Baker and Wallowa Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Services: Children's Play Groups Parent/Child Activity Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTION MATERIAL GOODS - BABY RESOURCES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
